header.title: Château de Châteauneuf (35433422176).jpg
header.description:
A view of the Château de Châteauneuf from the Autoroute du Soleil - A6, heading back to our hotel in Beaune, after a day that included visits to Fontenay Abbey,  Semur-en-Auxois and Flavigny-sur-Ozerain.
On the way up to those places in Burgundy, I did see the Château, but was on the wrong side of the coach, so saw it on the way back!

<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ch%c3%a2teau_de_Ch%c3%a2teauneuf" rel="noreferrer nofollow">Château de Châteauneuf</a>
The Château de Châteaune
header.author: Elliott Brown
